extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout won from the breakaway while POGAČAR attacked multiple times in final kilometer but VINGEGAARD matched every acceleration to preserve 10-second GC lead.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR attacked when VINGEGAARD looked away with 800m to go, using misdirection on steep summit finish.
UAE sandwiched VINGEGAARD between teammates before final kilometer, attempting leadout interference on cat-one finish.
NIELSSEN PALACE counter-attacked during unranked climb approach to first sprint, rejecting passenger-heavy 23-man break.

rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: First individual Tour stage win at age 35 after primarily serving as domestique for FROOME's GC campaigns.
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: Three consecutive acceleration attempts in final 800m showed form but unable to crack VINGEGAARD's response capacity.
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Aggressively came around POGAČAR at line despite defending, signaling psychological dominance heading into rest day.
rider_signals.LAWSON CRADDOCK Bob: positive: Fourth on stage, outperforming GC expectations suggests Americans finding form in third week.
